_comment: Each entry is a map link (string), a video slide, or a photo/overlay slide (objects).
Clicking or moving the cursor over the map canvas dismisses any slide early.
MAP LINK: a hash URL copied from the ShareMap button, with the origin stripped.
MAP LINK WITH OVERLAY: same but wrapped in an object so an image floats on top.
DIRECT FILE (recommended): S3 URL ending in .mp4 or .webm.
Plays via native video player — no CAPTCHA, no platform restrictions.
If playback is slow to start: ffmpeg -i input.mp4 -c copy -movflags faststart output.mp4
EMBED URL: YouTube (/embed/ form) or Vimeo (player.vimeo.com/video/) URL.
mute=1 is appended automatically. YouTube may show CAPTCHA in kiosk contexts.
'photo'      — GeoServer feature ID: table name + '.' + row number.
'photoIndex' — which image from the feature's lightbox array (default 0 = first).
